_INSTRUCTIONS: Merge this fragment into ~/.claude/settings.json under the top-level 'hooks' key. The 'SessionStart' entry merges under its respective top-level key; where the user already has hooks for an event, append to the existing hooks[] array. Replace $HOME with your actual home path — Claude Code does NOT expand env vars in the command string. Remove this _INSTRUCTIONS field after merging. NOTE (orch#94): the legacy filesystem-marker hooks (orch-stop-marker.sh, orch-notify-marker.sh, orch-session-jsonl.sh) and NATS-publish hooks (orch-nats-publish-{stop,notify,jsonl}.sh) have been retired. The Synadia Agent Protocol path via orch-agent-shim is the only path now — the shim handles Stop/Notification/SessionStart eventing over the bus. The only entry below is the still-live goal-session-context hook.
